channel.title: About me on
channel.description: Recent content in About me on

item.title: About me
item.description:
Publications and Theses

To appear

Leonova, P. & Baklanov. A. (2026). Glagoly semantičeskogo polja ‘menjatʹ’ v norvežskom jazyke (bukmol) [Verbs of the semantic field ‘change’ in Norwegian Bokmål]. Acta Linguistica Petropolitana. Transactions of the Institute for Linguistic Studies. Saint Petersburg, Russia: Nauka.(Accepted, Under review; in Russian).

2025

Baklanov, A. (2025). Lexical Scope of Nominal Tense Markers: A Pilot Typological Study (Master’s thesis, HSE University).

2023

Baklanov, A. (2023). Nominal Tense And Semantically Similar Markers In Siberia As An Areal Feature (Bachelor’s thesis, HSE University).
